title: Fit test - 1st screen UI
scenario: Verify Fit Test screen UI and text match Figma design for Osprey/Tern and Emu variants when starting the app with a supported device connected and navigating to Device Settings > Fit Test.
steps: 1. Connect a supported device to the app.
3. Navigate to Device Settings > Fit Test.
4. Observe the UI and text displayed on the first screen of the Fit Test.
expected: The UI and text on the first screen of the Fit Test match the Figma design for the Osprey/Tern and Emu variants.
